category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/gruntwork-io/fetch says fetch downloads files, folders, or release assets from git refs.
source_facts.description says it downloads assets from GitHub refs.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/gruntwork-io/fetch uses the project name fetch.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/gruntwork-io/fetch contains features, quick examples, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/gruntwork-io/fetch; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/gruntwork-io/fetch lists support for GitHub, GitHub Enterprise, GitLab, release assets, and checksums.
source_facts.description says it downloads assets from GitHub repositories.
